methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $40M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Space & Aerospace (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 23 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 64.2x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
Outpost Space, founded by Jason Dunn, is a seed-stage space and aerospace company that has raised $40M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comp universe of 5 public peers (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private-stage companies including SpaceX, Rocket Lab, Blue Origin, and Planet Labs.

A peer-median approach was not applicable due to insufficient same-stage and adjacent-stage comparables within the space sector—only 1 adjacent-stage peer was identified against a threshold of 3. Public comp anchoring using the sector's 64.2x price-to-sales median (calculated across 6 public tickers) could not be applied without access to Outpost's revenue figures, which remain undisclosed. The sole applicable method is stage-progression valuation: using the $40M raised as a proxy for current enterprise value and applying a 2.5x multiplier typical of seed-to-next-stage progression yields an implied valuation of $100M.

The triangulated valuation range is $85M–$115M, with a median of $100M. This single-method result carries material uncertainty. The primary limiting factor is the lack of revenue disclosure, which prevents calibration against public comparables trading at substantial multiples in this capital-intensive sector. Investors should treat this range as preliminary pending either additional private peer data at identical stage and scale, or disclosure of revenue run-rate to enable public-comp cross-check.
